nodes.label: Application Logo — blue triangular 'mountain/A' mark with white diagonal chevron cutout (duplicated as logo16/32/44/256.png in both private/images/ and public/images/, 8 files total, identical artwork at different resolutions)

nodes.label: Turns/ValClass DB Setup Script
nodes.rationale: SQL Server 2005-compatible DDL (no GO/CONCAT/DATETIME2) for the MM turns/valuation-class feature; stores data pulled from SapServer PerformanceController turns-valclass endpoints.

nodes.label: dbo.TurnsValClassSnapshot
nodes.rationale: One row per material/plant, TRUNCATE+reinsert on every sync like other *Snapshot tables. 13-month consumption history and demand forecast stored as wide columns (M12..M00) so the existing replaceTable() UNION ALL batch insert works unchanged.

nodes.label: dbo.ValuationClassCatalog
nodes.rationale: Valid valuation classes per material type (T025/T025T/T134) for the change-valuation-class dropdown.

nodes.label: dbo.ValuationClassChangeBatch
nodes.rationale: Append-only audit header, one row per change-valuation-class POST: order, plant, who, when, total value change.

nodes.label: dbo.ValuationClassChangeDetail
nodes.rationale: One row per material within a change batch; mirrors ValClassChangeResult from SapServer.

nodes.label: Shipment Creation Section
nodes.rationale: Groups tiles for building shipments from completed picksheets: Open Deliveries, Awaiting Booking, Customs Documents, Customer Specifics. Visible to LOG_VIEW but write actions require LOG_PLANNING, separating read visibility from planning authority.

nodes.label: Shipment Monitoring Section
nodes.rationale: Tracks shipment lifecycle after creation: Awaiting Collection, In Transit, Completed Shipments, Search, and a planned Inbound Log (marked SOON).

nodes.label: Material Planning Section
nodes.rationale: MRP-facing tiles: live stock turns/valuation tables, stock value overview and price-band breakdown, valuation class change (moves stock to an order, changes class in SAP, moves it back), and 13-month consumption history vs demand forecast. Purchase Orders, Schedule Agreements and MRP tiles are placeholders (SOON).

nodes.label: Logistics Admin Section
nodes.rationale: Admin-badged maintenance and analytics tiles: Freight Spend dashboard, Unprocessed Costs awaiting SAP MIGO processing, and master-data maintenance for pallets, packaging and destinations.

nodes.label: Tile Permission Gating (data-permission)
nodes.rationale: Each pn-section carries a data-permission attribute (LOG_VIEW, LOG_MRP, LOG_ADMIN) so client-side JS can show/hide entire tile groups per user permission; a comment notes write actions in Shipment Creation additionally require LOG_PLANNING.

nodes.label: Result Panel (tile drill-down view)
nodes.rationale: Hidden result-section swapped in place of the tile grid when a tile function runs; toolbar exposes backToTiles() and exportResultCSV() handlers plus row-count badge, so all tile functions share one output surface instead of separate pages.
